title: lotus gebelia var. hirsutissimus
intro: Lotus gebelia var. hirsutissimus, also known as the hairy lotus, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the genus Lotus. The hairy lotus is native to Australia and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, due to its rich content of flavonoids, saponins, and alkaloids. The plant is said to have medicinal properties that can help to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and have antimicrobial and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for digestive issues and skin health. In herbal preparations, the hairy lotus can be used as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
